tip: Sharing what makes you happy lifts others' mood too.
It is okay to feel sad. Talking to someone helps.
Take a slow breath. Anger fades faster than we expect.
Sudden change is normal. Pause before reacting.
Calm is a feeling too — protect your peace.
Rest is part of progress, not a setback.
Asking why is a sign of growth, not weakness.
Naming a fear out loud often makes it smaller.
Celebrate small wins — they build into big ones.
Healthy love includes respect and clear words.
Discomfort points to your values. Listen to it.
Everyone has been there. It passes faster than you think.
